name: school-visit-registration
description: SchoolGuard - Sistema de Registro de Visitas Escolares

scripts.build: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const path = require('path'); if (fs.existsSync('public')) fs.rmSync('public', { recursive: true, force: true }); fs.cpSync('src', 'public', { recursive: true }); const configPath = path.join('public', 'js', 'supabase-config.js'); if (fs.existsSync(configPath)) { let content = fs.readFileSync(configPath, 'utf8'); content = content.replace('__SUPABASE_URL__', process.env.SUPABASE_URL || ''); content = content.replace('__SUPABASE_ANON_KEY__', process.env.SUPABASE_ANON_KEY || ''); fs.writeFileSync(configPath, content); }"

author: SchoolGuard
